Month Explorer

Inspect exactly which contracts were live in each basket month.

This page is built for month-specific audit work. Pick a basket and month, scan the selected contract slate, and drill into weight history, direction, chain lineage, and the exact contract metadata used for that point in time.

Use case Single-month audit Input Generated basket-month compositions Detail Direction + chain history
Reading Guide

How to use this screen.

Start with the left table for the chosen month. Then use the right panel to understand the selected contract in context: historical weight path, chain replacements, and the exact direction semantics carried into the basket.

MonthExact rebalance slice
Contract listOnly contracts selected that month
Trend chartWeight history for selected contract
Chain historyLineage of related expiry markets
